identity.name: Vyapaar Network CRM
identity.audience: B2B Partners, Sales Associates, Customers, Admins

theme_strategy.recommendation: Use Light Mode as the default for data-heavy CRM tasks to ensure maximum legibility. Dark Mode should be available as a toggle for power users.

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, card headers, and modal titles. Letter spacing should be tight (-0.02em).

body.usage: Use for all standard text, table data, and form inputs. Excellent legibility at small sizes.

mono.usage: Use for API keys, IDs, and code snippets.

primary.name: Royal Blue
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, links, brand highlights.

secondary.name: Crimson
secondary.usage: Urgent actions, alerts, negative trends, 'Delete' actions.

layout.structure: Sidebar Navigation + Top Header + Main Content Area

sidebar.style: Fixed left. In Light Mode: Dark Slate (#0F172A) background for high contrast. In Dark Mode: Darker Gray (#020617).

header.style: Sticky top. Glassmorphism (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md). Border bottom.

layout.container: Fluid with max-width constraints (max-w-7xl) for large screens.

tables.style: Clean, spacious rows. Header: bg-muted/50 text-muted-foreground. Row hover: bg-muted/50.

visual_enhancers.shadows: Subtle, layered shadows. shadow-sm for cards, shadow-md for dropdowns/modals.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Avoid full-screen gradients. Use subtle mesh gradients in empty states or hero sections.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use sparingly on sticky headers and modal overlays.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid borders in Slate-200 (#E2E8F0) for definition.

image_urls.description: Modern skybridge connecting glass buildings. Use for Login/Register page split-screen background.
Diverse business team portrait. Use for 'Welcome' widgets or 'About' sections.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets WCAG AA standards. Use Slate-900 for main text on white.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings (ring-2 ring-primary/50) on all interactive elements.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Update tailwind.config.js to match the defined color palette (Primary: #4169E1, Secondary: #DC143C).
Implement the Sidebar Layout as the core shell for all Dashboard pages.
Use the 'Bento Grid' strategy for dashboard widgets.
Ensure all forms (Login, Lead Creation) use Shadcn Form components with Zod validation.
Use Recharts for all analytics (Revenue, Leads, Commissions).
Implement Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) in the frontend routing (e.g., ProtectedRoute component).
Use the provided image URLs for the Login page and Welcome widgets.
Do not use 'Inter' for Headings; import 'Manrope' from Google Fonts.
Add data-testid to all buttons, inputs, and links.
universal_guidelines: Avoid generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry and grids.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical (p-6, p-8).
No 'AI Slop' - keep it crisp, professional, and distinct.
